query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: Layered translucent orange-red sheets with irregular torn and burned edges float against a black background, with a solid black circle centered in the frame and scattered circular light spots of varying sizes distributed across the sheets.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Layered translucent orange-red sheets with irregular torn and burned edges float against a black background, their surfaces lacking fine detail or resolved texture so that edges and material qualities dissolve into soft indistinct forms. A solid black circle sits centered in the frame, surrounded by scattered circular light spots of varying sizes. The overall orange-red coloration shifts surfaces toward an unsettling heated hue, while the abstract arrangement of geometric and organic shapes against void rejects representational clarity in favor of surreal, dreamlike spatial logic where scale and subject remain unidentifiable.
